ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email_address" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, inactive, on leave) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the session */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was logged */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in minutes */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic or subject of the training session */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource used (e.g., book, online course, video) */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource used */,
  "previous_training_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of a previous training session if applicable */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the training session took place */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor who conducted the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., live, recorded, self-paced) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_resource_name FOREIGN KEY ("resource_name") REFERENCES resources ("resource_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_topic FOREIGN KEY ("topic") REFERENCES training_topics ("topic_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_resource_type FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the training topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training topic */,
  "prerequisite_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prerequisite topic (if any) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the topic (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_topics_prerequisite_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_topic_id") REFERENCES training_topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL or file path to the resource */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the resource */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is active */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head of the department */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or text field detailing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was assigned the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment ends (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-department mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user left the department (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_topics" (
  "session_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-topic mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "is_primary_topic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the topic is the primary topic of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES training_topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_topics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_resources" (
  "session_resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session-resource mapping */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "is_primary_resource" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is the primary resource of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or reflection */,
  "note_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was logged */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is private (visible only to the user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_notes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Rating score (1-5) */,
  "rating_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback or comments on the session */,
  "rating_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the rating was logged */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the rating is private (visible only to the user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_ratings_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certificate was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the certificate */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the certificate is still valid */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the entity issuing the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_certificates_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)
